reasoning.research: Google search works well with headless mode. Simple navigation and form fill. No JavaScript execution required for basic search results.
reasoning.strategy: Navigate to Google.com, wait for page, fill search field, press Enter, wait for results, extract HTML
reasoning.llm_learnings: Headless mode is efficient for search. Consider JavaScript wait patterns for dynamic content. ARIA tree provides structured result data.

next_ai_instructions: Use headless mode for all Google searches - minimal resource usage. Extract results from clean HTML or ARIA tree. Implement rate limiting for batch searches (1-2 searches/sec max). Can parallelize 100+ searches.
notes: Proof of concept - single query test. Ready for scaling to batch searches.
